purpose: Track every unavailable, disabled, and draft-only field group in the TQR research planning and tracking prototype v1, with the rendering behaviour and the admission preconditions required before each group may become a computed or official field. This file does not modify the spec and does not enable any field.
hard_boundary: No real-time quotes, paid sources, provider credentials, broker connectivity, order placement, unattended screening, or automatic promotion is authorized by these contracts (spec lines 14-18).

contracts.ui_treatment: em dash plus an explicit source gap; never estimate from price (spec lines 46, 49-51)
enabling_preconditions: free-source admission contract per source (spec line 51)
normalization contract for per-source field mapping (spec line 51)
point-in-time (PIT) contract with explicit available_at (spec lines 18, 51)
data-quality admission contract (spec line 51)

contracts.ui_treatment: em dash plus an explicit source gap; unavailable for this entire product phase
enabling_preconditions: product-phase decision admitting an estimate/consensus source (spec line 52)
any future source must satisfy the no-paid-source, no-credential boundary (spec lines 14-16)

contracts.ui_treatment: Close is the only current price basis; Adjusted Close stays disabled (spec lines 52-54)
enabling_preconditions: adjusted OHLCV and volume policy approved (spec lines 53-54)
P5.1 source admission unblocked (tqe-p5-adjusted-ohlcv-volume-policy.json: p5_1_unlocked_by_this_policy=false)
P5.4 applies the defined policy after source admission (tqe-p5-adjusted-ohlcv-volume-policy.json: p5_4_application_required=true)

contracts.ui_treatment: em dash plus an explicit source gap until separately admitted (spec lines 65-68)
enabling_preconditions: per-field source admission contract (spec lines 66-67)
point-in-time availability and data-quality state recorded per record (spec line 18)

contracts.ui_treatment: em dash plus an explicit source gap until separately admitted (spec lines 65-68)
enabling_preconditions: per-field source admission contract for each external-risk field (spec lines 63, 66-68)
no paid sources or provider credentials (spec lines 14-16)

contracts.ui_treatment: regime values Risk-on/Correction/Risk-off/Unknown are vocabulary only; inputs stay unavailable unless the required source is admitted (spec lines 132-135)
enabling_preconditions: the required source for each regime input is admitted (spec lines 134-135)
breadth, futures positioning, and VIX inputs additionally depend on their own field contracts in this file

spec_sections.section: Regime, signal, tranche, and risk vocabulary

contracts.ui_treatment: setting vocabulary exposed; no calculation result claimed (spec lines 85-88)
enabling_preconditions: period recorded before computation (spec line 86)
price basis recorded (spec line 86)
population/sample convention recorded (spec line 87)
admitted price-policy contract exists (spec lines 87-88)

spec_sections.section: Field dictionary / Observation pool and comparison

contracts.ui_treatment: local human setting; non-authoritative personal input, not an official datum (spec lines 47, 77-83)
enabling_preconditions: permitted as a local prototype draft already (spec line 77); must never be presented as an official or calculated value

spec_sections.section: Field dictionary / Observation pool and comparison

contracts.ui_treatment: manual input labelled draft; must not be represented as market consensus or an official forward estimate (spec lines 98-100)
enabling_preconditions: worksheet shows EPS source, PE source, safety margin, formula version, and data status (spec lines 98-99)

contracts.ui_treatment: UI draft; no automatic execution; P1 does not execute nested logic or derive missing inputs (spec lines 28, 122-123)
enabling_preconditions: referenced data fields admitted under their own contracts before a row can compute (spec line 123)
nested-group execution requires a separate execution contract; AND/OR/NOT composition stays interactive-only in P1 (spec lines 121-123)
factor definition requires name, source field, direction, transformation, weight, missing-value policy, bounds, and enabled state recorded (spec lines 125-127)
total score remains a human-run research calculation, never an automatic action (spec lines 127-128)

contracts.ui_treatment: settings draft plus existing read-only result (spec lines 30, 147-150)
enabling_preconditions: start/end date recorded only when admitted (spec lines 147-148)
PIT-safe invariant visible: signal uses data available after market close, fill is next open / next VWAP / next close (spec lines 150-155)
reject the invalid same-close signal/fill combination (spec line 157)
report metrics shown only when they belong to a reproducible saved result (spec lines 157-161)

contracts.ui_treatment: explicit human plans in P1, not an execution engine (spec lines 137-141)
enabling_preconditions: remains vocabulary/human plan only; any automation would require a separate product-phase authorization (spec lines 34-37, 141)

spec_sections.section: Regime, signal, tranche, and risk vocabulary

cannot_claim: any draft promoted to an official or calculated value
